configurations.name: expo-dev-client
runtimeArgs: set PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;%PATH% && npx expo start --dev-client --port 8081

configurations.name: expo-web
runtimeArgs: set PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;%PATH% && npx expo start --web --port 8083

configurations.name: demo-dist
runtimeArgs: set PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;%PATH% && npx serve dist --single -l 8090

configurations.name: greenie-backoffice
runtimeArgs: cd /d C:\Source\greenie-backoffice && set PATH=C:\Program Files\nodejs;%PATH% && npx next dev --port 3001
